prompt: Describe the image in a long, detailed paragraph. Be thorough and cover the main subject, the setting, all visible objects, actions, spatial relationships, colors, and contextual details. Aim for a rich, complete description of the scene.

baseline.caption_ref:
The black-and-white photograph captures an old school classroom with numerous children posing together for a group picture. There are at least thirteen kids in various positions within the frame, some standing while others sit on chairs that can be seen throughout the room. They appear to be enjoying their time as they gather around each other.

The classroom is furnished with multiple chairs placed near the walls or along the edges of the room. Some chairs are positioned closer to the front of the room, while others are situated further back. Additionally, there's a tie hanging from one of the chairs, adding a touch of personal style to the scene.
